Emil Parsini  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

Category: EverQuest

Level: 25
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2025-11-16 09:34:56

Goods sold (16):
Absinthe Glass 1gp 4cp
Absinthe Spoon 1pp 4sp 9cp
Backpack 5gp 7sp 7cp
Belt Pouch 1gp 5sp 7cp
Black Ceremonial Coffin 1pp 4gp 6sp 9cp
Bottle 5cp
Cask 3sp 1cp
Large Bag 3gp 1sp 4cp
Large Box 5gp 2sp 4cp
Nectar of the Green Fairy 26pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Purse 1sp 5cp
Quiver 1pp 5gp 7sp 4cp
Small Bag 1gp 8sp 8cp
Small Box 2gp 9cp
The Drink of Timeless Energy 26pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Wrist Pouch 1gp 4cp
Items Given:
Treant Resin
Peacekeeper Staff

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Decreased:
  Merchants of Erudin
Quests:
  Peacekeeper Staff

Report a correction

Updated Complete List of Items on Merchant
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2011 at 11:56 PM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
Includes 6 new items:

[Thu Jan 13 21:55:11 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 4 copper per Absinthe Glass.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:11 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 platinum 4 silver 9 copper per Absinthe Spoon.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:12 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 7 silver 7 copper for the Backpack.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:13 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 5 silver 7 copper for the Belt Pouch.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:14 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 platinum 4 gold 6 silver 9 copper for the Black Ceremonial Coffin.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:15 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 5 copper per Bottle.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:15 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 3 silver 1 copper per Cask.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:16 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 3 gold 1 silver 4 copper for the Large Bag.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:17 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 5 gold 2 silver 4 copper for the Large Box.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:18 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 26 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper for the Nectar of the Green Fairy.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:18 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 silver 5 copper for the Purse.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:19 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 platinum 5 gold 7 silver 4 copper for the Quiver.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:20 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 8 silver 8 copper for the Small Bag.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:20 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 2 gold 9 copper for the Small Box.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:21 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 26 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper for the The Drink of Timeless Energy.'
[Thu Jan 13 21:55:22 2011] Emil Parsini tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 4 copper for the Wrist Pouch.'

This one does not like Necromancers and will not have any dealings with them

Location
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2003 at 12:39 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251865701
Scholar
65 posts
This guy is located in a building at /loc pos2155, pos430. It's near the zone to Erudin (a bit southwest of it).

Bienbonita
▲ Page top
How to Raise Merchant Faction
QuoteReply
# May 10 2002 at 10:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768984759
View User Forum
199 posts
FIRST:

Head out to WFP. There are two merchants part of the /Faydark's Champions/ faction:
- Pandos Flintside
- Jyle Windshot

If you are not AMIABLE to Jyle Windshot, you will need to see Pandos Flintside to raise it. His quest involves Muffins.

Just buy a bunch from some merchant in FP, and give them to him by 4s in each slot trade slot.

Once you have made amiable with Jyle, Go buy a bunch of /Small Lanterns/. Give them to Jyle. He will give you in return /Wood Chips/. I think he also gives you Treant Hearts. They are of no use to this quest.

Head over to Erudin's Toxx Forest. The first hut to your right when leaving Erudin is where you will find Emil Parsini.

To him, give the wood chips in stacks of 4s. This should raise Guard, High Council, and Merchant Faction.

Edited, Thu May 16 13:04:18 2002
▲ Page top
Treant resin comes from him
QuoteReply

Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Take the treant chips to him
